data.title: Update INSTALL.md with artifact version stamp mechanism and update workflow documentation
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md to document the artifact auto-update system: version stamp mechanism, session-start notification, dso update-artifacts command, claude plugin sync prerequisite, and legacy migration.

### Sections to add/update:
1. Version stamp mechanism: explain # dso-version: for text and x-dso-version: for YAML
2. Session-start notification: when it fires, when silent, 24h cache, plugin-source-repo guard
3. dso update-artifacts command: usage, success output, conflict output (exit 2 + JSON with base64)
4. claude plugin sync prerequisite: must run before dso update-artifacts
5. Legacy artifact migration: no stamp = legacy, one-time migration notice

### TDD Exemption Justification
test-exempt: criterion 3 (static assets only — documentation markdown file with no executable behavior)

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains version stamp mechanism section
  Verify: grep -q 'dso-version' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains dso update-artifacts command documentation
  Verify: grep -q 'update-artifacts' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md
- [ ] INSTALL.md mentions claude plugin sync prerequisite
  Verify: grep -q 'plugin sync' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md
- [ ] INSTALL.md covers legacy artifact migration
  Verify: grep -qi 'legacy' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.
